summary: Phase 4 testing completed successfully - Observability, Go-Live Checklist, KVKK Compliance, and Deployment Guide. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly with proper RBAC enforcement.
passed_tests: GET /api/observability - Returns summary, agents, tenants data with correct structure
GET /api/observability with hotel_id filter - Works correctly
GET /api/hotels/{id}/go-live-checklist - Returns 10 checklist items with passed/total counts
GET /api/compliance/status - Returns data inventory, PII inventory, retention policy, compliance checklist
GET /api/compliance/access-log - Admin only access (managers denied)
POST /api/compliance/export-request - Admin and manager can export, creates audit log
POST /api/compliance/deletion-request - Admin only can request deletion
GET /api/deployment/guide - Returns structured deployment documentation
Observability page loads with KPIs, agent health cards, tenant readiness section
Go-Live Checklist page loads with readiness percentage (50%) and 10 categorized items
KVKK Compliance page loads with data inventory KPIs, compliance checklist, PII field inventory, retention policy, export/delete buttons
Deployment Guide page loads with architecture, agent installation steps, network requirements, credential vault, environment separation
Navigation sidebar shows new items: Gozlemlenebilirlik (Observability), KVKK Uyumluluk, Dagitim Rehberi
Hotels table has Go-Live Checklist button (ClipboardCheck icon)
Login audit logging works - login creates audit event (login_success)
RBAC: front_desk users correctly cannot see observability, compliance, agents, kbs-control, hotels, users nav items
RBAC: hotel_manager correctly sees observability, compliance, but NOT users
RBAC: admin has full access to all Phase 4 endpoints
Language toggle works on all new pages (TR/EN)
Unauthenticated access to compliance endpoints correctly returns 401/403
seed_data_creation: None - used existing hotels from Phase 3
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 complete. All new endpoints for observability, go-live checklist, KVKK compliance, and deployment guide are working. RBAC is correctly enforced. Hotels in system: Grand Istanbul Hotel (e2d8a4a2-7499-46ad-be2b-a8aa6db149db), Test Grand Hotel, Test Automation Hotel. The system uses JWT auth with Bearer tokens. KBS SOAP endpoint and Bridge Agent are MOCKED internal simulators.

mocked_apis.KBS SOAP Endpoint: Internal simulator - not connected to real EGM/Jandarma KBS
mocked_apis.Bridge Agent: Internal simulator - mimics real agent behavior

phase_4_feature_summary.observability: Provides system-wide monitoring with success rates, retry counts, quarantine counts, agent health, tenant readiness, and last transmission status per hotel
phase_4_feature_summary.go_live_checklist: 10-point readiness verification per hotel including authority region, integration type, contact info, static IP, credentials, connection test, agent status, test submission, retry flow, and audit trail
phase_4_feature_summary.kvkk_compliance: KVKK Article 7 & 11 compliant - data inventory, PII field inventory, retention policy (365 days guest/submission, 730 days audit), data export (JSON with masked PII), and data deletion (admin only)
phase_4_feature_summary.deployment_guide: Architecture docs (Cloud Panel, Bridge Agent, KBS Endpoint), agent installation (5 steps), network requirements, credential vault protection, environment separation (Test/Staging/Production), per-hotel configuration
